As Simba reflected on what to do about Nala, he realized that he had available already an avenue that he could use. Since he had to go and express his apologies to Asha, he could use that moment as a justification to let her believe whatever he wanted about his mate.

‘For example, I could let her think that If Nala get too fat, I will get displeased with her and leave her for someone worthier…’

With this plan in mind, Simba left his den and went searching for the lioness. When he finally found her he approached her and asked if he could talk to her in private. As soon as the two of them were alone, trying hard not to reveal himself too much he placed his plan in motion.

“Asha, I wanted to apologize for the mistrust I brought between you and Nala, with my actions.”

The lioness, looked askance at her king, accepting the apology but wondering what the real reasons for him was in telling her that. As she wondered that, she couldn’t refrain to voice her thoughts.

“I thank you for your apologies, my King. Still, I can’t help but wonder why you had to say those things, if I may ask?”

Simba, as he grinned inwardly, tried to act as embarrassed as he could.

“I…The truth is…I had hoped that with those comments, Nala could…refrain… from getting out of…shape. Do not misunderstand my words, I love her with all my hearth, but…seeing her…in such a way… isn’t as appealing… as she was.

I just feel so sorry, now, that you had to get caught in the crossfire. I sincerely hoped she would just back down, returning to be the lioness I fell in love with.”

Asha was excited by this news, although she tried her hardest to not show it as she quickly dismissed her King comments, thanking him again as he left, leaving her to her thoughts. As Simba returned to his den to greet Nala, Asha began plotting within herself on how she could use this information to her advantage.

‘So, King Simba isn’t pleased with the Queen attraction to eating, uh?

Maybe, if Nala got too big to move, I could replace her as Simba’s mate. I just have to convince the other lionesses that Nala needs more food.

And when she’ll be so big that she can’t fit within Pride Rock, I will replace her as Simba’s Mate.’

Quickly, as the morning passed, Asha began to lay down her lies regarding to Nala’s situation, making the other lionesses aware that their queen was afflicted by a strange disease.

“Nothing that will spread to all of us, yet…it is serious.

Our Queen seems to be losing weight so easily that she’s sneaking out food more than what is normally her usual… But being her the leader, she is trying to not let us know about it.

The poor thing…”

The other lionesses seemed to be lapping up every word Asha said without a doubt, some of them already were thinking of going and show respect for Nala but, luckily for Asha, the veteran hunters of the groups stopped them.

“Girls, you can’t do that!

How would Queen Nala feel if she knew that we knew about her disease? No, Asha is right. We’ve gotta help her without her knowing.

Starting from today, three of us will hunt specifically for our Queen. To make sure that she won’t get suspicious we will say that the hunt went particularly well.

Plus, we can change who brings her the preys, so dividing the luck between various hunters….”

Asha couldn’t be happier seeing how perfectly her plan seemed to have started.

‘Soon, Queen Nala. Soon I’ll take your place beside Simba.’


When the time came for the hunters to go provide food for the Pride, Nala fell to the sweet words of her husband and, decided to let him go hunting in her stead, although both knew that he wasn’t as good a hunter as she was. Still, when the hunting party returned, she stood shocked in seeing how much he had managed to bring to her. As she had been lazing around in the den, she had quickly fallen asleep, waking up only when she heard Simba’s returning.

As she groggily stared at the entrance of the den she couldn’t believe her eyes.
There was Simba dragging quite the elderly gazelle but, as he left that inside, he quickly moved another, quite portly, gazelle into the den.

“Simba? You…You managed to take down two preys all by yourself!?”

Smiling he raised his head, acting like a true king of the jungle and replied.

“I would love to say yes…but no. The other lionesses had an especially good hunt and we managed to get you an entire gazelle for you. I downed the elderly one.”

Nala, feeling rather hungry having had nothing to eat all day, began to move toward the carcasses but, Simba stopped her in her tracks, as he brought the meals to her.

“Now, now, you won’t ever grow big if you move around all the time. Stay there and let me serve you, My Queen…”

As much as she wanted to put on some weight, to feel herself growing fat, she still had done nothing at all that morning and was rather bored but, seeing Simba so servile towards her made her smile and so she simply backed down again and waited as the meals were brought to her.

As soon as the first was under her nose she began eating it in earnest, quickly cleaning all the meat from the bones. Feeling her belly getting full, she burped in pleasure and yet, she stared hungrily to the other carcass that, already, Simba was bringing to her.

“Oh, no…I couldn’t eat another bite…”

“You sure, Nala? I don’t want to force you but…one measly prey is all you’re having… That seems way too low.”

Nala, patting a bit her full belly with her paws had to admit that she still had quite a bit of space left and yet, she didn’t want to look too greedy. Especially now that they were in Pride Rock. Still, with Simba standing so close, looking at her expectantly, and with the meal smelling so marvelous, she licked her chops and began eating again, stopping once just to let her mate know that he was going to finish the rest.

“But of course, Nala. But, please, eat your fill, first.”


This process started to repeat itself at her every meal, with Nala starting to get used to it as she needed less and less prodding to indulge. And, since most days were starting to be lucky days for the hunt, her stomach capacity too seemed to be increasing. As the Queen gorged, her stomach expanded, and fat began to spread all around her body.

Already a few days had passed and this diet, coupled with the lack of exercise, started to show itself on Nala’s body. If before she looked a bit chubby, she was starting to look downright rotund these days. Her face had softened up quite a bit, with a definite second chin sprouting on her neck, while the rest of her had gotten soft and jiggly. Her legs had thickened up quite a bit, as she now used mostly her front paws, and only to grab the next prey bringing it toward her muzzle. Her belly, too, had gotten rather heavier. Apart from the fact that it now hung so low that it was closer and closer to the ground, it was also often kept full to the brim.

Yet, Nala, as much as she had noticed her increase in consumption, was feeling rather good, since there had been no more signs of Simba’s working behind her back. Yet, as much as she had started to love to just laze around in her den, she forced herself to move around at least one time per week. Just to have the possibility to herself of remembering how difficult it was getting to move around.

Still, the other lionesses had begun noticing that their Queen was starting to look rather…round as of late.

As their doubts increased, Asha found herself to reinforce the plan she had placed in motion.

“I’m telling you, Queen Nala seems healthier as of late but, if we stop she will quickly return to losing weight. We can’t stop now.”

“Asha, we understand your concern but, are you sure about all this?
Queen Nala does seem to be getting rather…out of shape as of late…”

The lioness, feigning to having been offended, turned her back on the rest of the hunters.

“Well, if you believe that she will be okay, stop. I will continue to provide her with some extras. I heard Rafiki saying to Simba that this condition might be tricky to be treated, as it doesn’t show its effects immediately. But feel free to do as you believe.”

The other lionesses, as they looked within themselves, they finally agreed on continuing to provide their queen with additional food.
141122121111211212.title: Starting on a fattening web of intrigues…

choices: release of feeder's inducing pheromones
Intelligence reduction, as in making one more gullible.
lowered metabolysm
Fat cells multiplication
Something else…
1411221211112112124.content:
Weeks had passed since Asha and Simba had been giving Nala much more to eat than what her body really needed to consume, and yet, as the Queen kept growing bigger, she also refused to let herself go when it came to moving around.

As a promise to herself she vowed to stop moving around only when she was too big to actually be doing it. Yet, as she went for her usual, although getting shorter as days of indulgence passed, walk she made an encounter that would change her life forever.

She was currently waddling just outside of the Pride Rock perimeter, her entire body wobbling and jiggling at her every movement. Due to the constant indulgence and the, ever increasing, amounts of food given to her, Nala was getting rather fat for the standard lion. Already her big, flabby belly, was often being dragged on the ground, while her legs were getting so thick and so covered in fat that she had to stop herself often just to regain her breath.

Yet, since her objective was to gain weight, and since Simba kept complimenting her, Nala wasn’t really noticing how big she was getting.

She knew, of course, of having gained weight but, she just wasn’t truly aware on how much.

As she ambled through the savannah, in a patch that had been already cleared by Simba of any unwanted predator, she stopped to take a breather near some kind of oasis. She could see the pond of water and the trees but, there wasn’t sign of anybody having ever gone there. What she didn’t notice were a pair of binoculars coming out of a nearby bush, as they aligned themselves on the blobby lion.

“Man…look at the size of the lion.

I wonder how did she manage to get that fat?

Still, considering the nature of our research, she could be prime test material.”

Within the bush, holding the binoculars, there was a human male dressed in a camouflaged suit. He had been tasked to find a few animals that could be used as test subjects for the current research of its company lab. They had managed, without being spotted by the authorities, to open up a sort of lab in the middle of the Savannah, gaining so access to all the animals living there.

Since that particular zone was often left at its own devices by the African government, thye had managed quite easily to have a base of operations directly there.

Nala, instead, as she began feeling the heat of the blazing sun above her, resumed her slow waddle toward the oasis, as she then started to drink the water in the pond, searching for refreshment, although her mind was already starting to wonder on what Simba was going to bring home for her to munch on.

As the lioness stood there, head craned down as much as she could toward the water, the human exchanged the binoculars with a gas fueled rifle, starting to observe the massive lioness with its scope.

“Yeah…you, girl, will do wonders for our research. Just have to tag you and to inject you with our serum.
Now, babe, hold still… Just like that…aaand…There!”

As he took aim he quickly shot, silently, two times, in rapid succession, at the wobbling female. The first shot was nothing else but an electronic gps, which they were going to use to follow around the test subject. The second shot instead was a dart containing the serum they were studying in their research. With both shots successfully hitting the target, the man began to move away, seeing as the lioness had become aware of having been pricked not once, but twice.

“What was that?! Did something swat me on my back!?”

Suddenly afraid, she turned around on herself, trying to see if something was wrong with herself but, considering how big she was getting, she couldn’t exactly see what had touched her.

“Maybe it was a bug? Still, it’s getting late, I should return to Pride Rock. I wonder what Simba will bring me today. I hope it’s another wildebeest… or two.”

Ignoring the slight swelling on one of her butt cheeks, she resumed her slow waddle, ambling through the plain savannah, as she made her way back toward Pride Rock. As she walked away, though, the human researcher had just been waiting for that. As soon as he saw the lioness trying to leave, he pointed his gun toward a nearby wildebeest and quickly fell it, silently.

As the researcher kept his watch, he waited to see if the serum would be already having an effect on the fattened lioness.

Nala was getting out of there, wanting to return to Simba’s but, suddenly, she smelled the sweet aroma of fresh prey and right after that her hunger spiked up. Not anymore one to deny her hunger, she turned and began to waddle toward the beast lying in the middle of the Savannah. As she inspected it, she noticed right away that it was deeply asleep, and only seemingly dead, and yet, as her belly grumbled she didn’t worry too much about it as she started to enjoy the sudden meal.

As she left behind her the fresh pile of bones, she felt much better, with her almost full belly sloshing around as she moved, as it gurgled pleasantly. Strangely enough, she noticed, she wasn’t feeling full. Her gaze shifted toward to the closer, and yet far away, herd of zebras that seemed too busy grazing to be worried by her.

Or, more probably, they knew that such a rotund lion could not reach them or follow them.

Still, she longingly looked at them, licking her lips as she somehow desired to have another meal, although that thought suddenly worried her.

‘I’ve just ate an entire wildebeest; how could I need more?
And, yet…Simba said I’m looking smaller than before…and they sure seem to be juicy…’


The researcher smiled as he saw the lioness gorge on the animal he had put to sleep, yet he was aware that that meant nothing. To be sure that the serum was indeed working within that female, he had to make sure that she ate again. As he turned around, he too noticed the herd of zebras and, quickly taking aim, he swiftly placed to sleep one of the biggest in the herd.

Not even for a moment he wondered what consequences there would be for the rest of the herd, the researcher wanted immediate results and that was the only way for him to obtain them.

As Nala gazed longingly at the alpha of the herd, she suddenly noticed that it yelped as if something spooked him and then fell to the ground unmoving. The lioness, although aware that she couldn’t have felt the hunger that she believed to be feeling, nonetheless waddled slowly toward the fallen zebra, as the rest of the herd scattered away.

Nala, now standing atop the sleeping zebra, opened her mouth greedily as she began to eat, the hunger in her pushing her to finish the entire beast. As she ate, her belly began to fill up with food, until it reached its previously known fullness point. And yet, this time, she kept on swallowing, picking the bones clean until no meat was left at all around the bones.

Feeling definitively content, the lioness burped her satisfaction as she seemed to return to her mind. As she looked around, she noticed that she had managed to completely consume two massive animals and yet, although she was now feeling full, she still felt a residual hunger in her gut. Dismissing the thought, she tried to move back toward Pride Rock but, suddenly realized that she had a major problem. Her belly, which already had been dragging on the ground, was now even more bloated than before, forcing her to move with a strange gait.

Alternating her front paws and her back paws, using her boulder sized belly as leverage, she began to slowly return home.

Still in hiding the researcher smiled seeing that the serum was apparently working and wondered how long would have passed before the fattened lioness began to experience the first effects from it, near constant hunger and…
1411221211112112124.title: Waddling in the sun...

choices: The one who tagged her will get her away, and care for her personally.
We will have her move within tomorrow to this very lab for tests
We will let her be but will provide serum injected food to her.
We’ll let her live there, for now. We’re in the Observation Phase, people.
Something else…
14112212111121121244.content:
As Nala returned to Pride Rock, Simba was ecstatic in seeing how bigger she looked. At first he had been worried about those ‘walkies’ of hers, thinking that she could still be trying to slow down her gain, but, as he saw her returning barely able to move, dragging her boulder belly on the ground, he was thankful for them. As she made to advance, Simba was suddenly at her side, helping her along as if she was the most delicate thing around, as soon as he offered support she began instantly to believe that he wanted only what was best for her.

“Simba…?”

“Yes, My love?”

“I…I’ve given…though…on what… we’ve done, since today.

About my size. And, I’ve come to a conclusion.”

As she said that, Simba froze internally, while externally he didn’t show any reaction, inside he was babbling crazily, unable to believe that after all he had done to get her bigger, she was now going to try and return to her old shape.

“I see, now, what you are doing, Simba.”

“Wh-What?”

“You’re just doing what’s best for me! How could I have been so blind not to see it?
You love me so much, and yet I’ve tried to slow you down…Please, love, accept my apologies… I’ll do as you see fit, from now on.

Because I know that you are doing it only for my benefit.”

As she stopped, laying down on the rocky floor of the den, Simba was deprived of his speech.

So completely surprised he literally didn’t know what to say. After a few moments of silence, though, his brain repeated clearly to him what he had just heard, as a massive smile filled his muzzle.

She had come around! She was now placing herself under his care!

But was this a trap? Was she trying to rat him pout of his true intentions?

As he looked at her he could only see, though, a sincere smile and a simpler light in her eyes.

‘I don’t know if it’s a trap or not…but, now that she’s said it. I need to take advantage of that. I’ll have to be outrageous in my requests and, if she accepts them, then… Then the real fun will begin!’


“B-But of course, Nala. I always have tried to support you. But, you must be tired. Sleep for a bit, my Queen, I’ll see to scrounge up a snack for you, for when you wake up…”

As Simba said that, he immediately went outside, calling his lionesses to him, as he made clear to them that the Queen was in dire need of food. She, he told them, was in a critical stage of a strange disease, one where she was in need of constant feedings. For that reason, he began to plead with them to bring much more than ever before. Still, just as he began pleading to them, the huntresses stopped him. They told him that they too had been aware of something going on, without revealing who had told them that, and so were more than willing to help the royal couple.

A couple of hours later, Nala stirred up, groggily waking as she found herself in her den. Suddenly, though, her stare gravitated toward a spot near the entrance, where Simba was waiting for her to wake. But what caught her attention, as it was confirmed by the large growling sound coming from her belly, was the large pile of carcasses that was left on the ground, beside her husband.

“Simba? Is that…Is that all for me?”

“Sure it is, my Love. You need to have some more meat on you, you’re starting to look deprived, dear.”

As Nala inspected, unconsciously, her soft, flabby belly, with a paws, she couldn’t move her gaze from the meal that her lover was giving to her. Under her hungry stare, she counted a couples of Antelopes, a few Gazelles and even a Zebra. Yet, all that food didn’t seem to get her worried at all. She was getting hungrier by the minute.

Waddling slowly, for although her belly had deflated quite a bit, still it hung down near the ground, separated by it by a few inches only, she got closer and closer to the preys, until she began to face dive into the pile, taking huge chunks of meat out of it and swallowing them greedily. As soon as the first chunk of meat landed in her stomach, her hunger began to grow stronger and stronger, forcing her to delve even more ferociously into the pile of food.

At the same time, as the meat in her began to digest, her serum affected body began to process that food, increasing by several time the caloric impact from it.

As Nala kept on glutting herself, Simba couldn’t believe his eyes. As he stared at her rump, held up in the air, he though he could see it as it began to grow bigger and jigglier. Rubbing his eyes, he soon realized he wasn’t dreaming. His Nala was, literally, growing bigger, softer and fatter, the more she ate. So mesmerized by what he was seeing, he almost missed the fact that the pile of food was starting to dwindle into nothingness. Suddenly worried for this spectacle to come to an end, he quickly rushed out of the den, breathing in relief as he saw that the huntresses had already returned with a new load for their Queen.

Using his strength, he began to drag the fresh carcasses into his den, adding them quickly to the dwindling pile that Nala, so fervently, kept consuming.

The queen herself was feeling excited, starving and hopeful about her future. She wasn’t entirely sure on the reasons, but as soon as she started to eat, she felt her hunger grows into this black, endless pit, and yet she had to try to satisfy it. Feeling herself tired she soon was forced to lay down on her belly, and yet she kept eating, unable to stop, even as she saw how her own body was faring under that deluge of food.

As she looked at her surrounding, in fact, she saw that she was growing bigger and wider. Her belly, pooling out around herself, as it began to slowly push her higher and higher toward the ceiling, until she coulnd’t reach her food anymore. Helplessly flailing her legs, she tried to get back at her food, and yet, without the immediate presence of food, she suddenly realized she was way overfull. Feeling like she could burst at any moment.

Simba had watched enthralled, as he kept refilling the pile of carcasses for his mate to eat, as she kept eating herself into the biggest lion he had ever seen. As he noticed that she had stopped, he started to get closer, to help her continue, until he noticed that the moon was starting already to move toward the horizon, sign that morning wasn’t that far away.

Still, as he gazed upon her massively bloated form, he decided that she had done enough, especially considering that was only her first day. Moving beside her, he nuzzled her bloated, and tight as a drum, side as he then moved toward her face, seeing how exhausted she looked.

“You did well, Nala.”

“I… *BUAHRP!*… I did?”

“Yes, My love. For your first time, you did good. We just have to practice a bit more, until you will eat exactly what you need to be healthy.”

“*Yawn* I…I see... Simba…I’m happy…you’re here…helping… me…”

As she fell asleep, he snuggled closer to her, willing himself to sleep as well, already dreaming on what the following days were going to bring. As the two lions slept, they were unaware that something was watching them from far away. Deep down, in an underground facility, humans were clustered around a terminal, intently watching the video feed coming from the stealth drone that was currently on the field.

Using the GPS signal that one of the researchers had managed to tag on a perfect specimen, the drone was currently moving silently into the den were the tagged specimen was resting. The humans were all extremely excited by what they were seeing, through the night vision and infrared camera.

“Look at that! She’s grown hugely from when I’ve tagged her.”

“Yes, the serum is, seemingly, applying its first effects on the specimen.

See how big she has gotten? You can be assured that by tomorrow night, she may even double herself in size. The serum seems to be progressing from the initial phase to its first evolution.

Soon, she should show extreme interest in her growing size.”

The figure on the screen was indeed massive.

Nala’s previous boulder belly had been so stuffed with food, which had been quickly processed and turned into, several times more than its original quantities, fat tissue, that now she was several times bigger even than Simba. As the drone kept recording, everyone could see the large lion sleeping, right beside the humongous mountain of fat that the lioness was turning herself into.

Thanks to the serum effects, she had been forced to gain more than a couple of tons already, rendering her pretty much immobile. Yet, as the scientists knew, that was only the beginning.

For the test to be considered a success, they had to verify that the subject was going to gain not only massive weight in the shortest time, but also to receive a powerful wave of lust and desire to increase its size by several times, each time.

“Shouldn’t we…recover her and bring forward the tests directly here in the lab? That would speed up the process greatly…”

“True…” replied another scientist “…But seeing how the life of the community will change revolting around our specimen could also give us important data regarding the more advanced stages of the Serum effects.”

As more people began to get themselves into the discussion, before the situation could explode, the Lead researcher halted his colleagues with firm voice.

“Listen up, these, will be our priorities…”
14112212111121121244.title: The fast thickening of Queen Nala

choices: Collect her and have a trapper, able to share feelings with lions, to feed her
Collect her and connect her to an automated feeding machine, within the lab
Deposit her halfway from her den and the Lab, then feed her through a hose
Start delivering industrial processed food to alleviate the eco-system from her
Something else…
141122121111211212444.content:
As days passed, the meals brought to Nala only kept increasing in size, and as her ravenous hunger began increasing, so did her size. The serum that the humans had injected her with, had been changing her internally, forcing her body to multiply the caloric value of whatever she ate, by multiple times.

Simba, and the other lionesses were in awe as they saw their Queen grow to unbelievable size, day after day. Yet, after barely a week of this insistent diet regime, Simba had been forced to request assistance to move the now obese Nala out of the den of Pride Rock, since she was getting so big that, if gone unchecked, she could have potentially destroyed the entire rock formation where they lived.

So, with the assistance of all the lionesses, and of a few elephants, they managed to move the immobile Nala out in the open.

Incredibly, once outside, Nala’s enormity was even more realistic, than before.

The once proud huntress was now turned into an oozing pile of flabby, wobbling fat. Her own weight, if a method to weight her would have been available, had soared in that week to an impressive four tons, already, albeit actually a bit shorter than that.

Her belly pooled out beneath her, lifting the rest of her body high from the ground, forcing Simba, and a couple of lionesses as helpers, to stand on Nala’s own body, in order to bring food to her muzzle. Her four legs had also changed, due to the amount of fat covering her body. Her former toned legs and paws were now nothing more than stubs poking out from the jiggly mound she was becoming. Her paws, flapped uselessly, constricted as they were within the rolls of flab in which they were enveloped. Her tail, too had thickened up quite a lot, absorbing fat similar to a sponge with water, it had grown so thick to, possibly, rival the size of a young cub, while being absolutely unmovable.
But, what most caught the eyes, apart from the humongous middle, was her muzzle.

Nala was barely able to squint, nowadays, as fat seemed to sprout all over her head, enveloping it as it cascaded down toward the multiple chin rolls, she sported on her neck. And yet, she seemed content to just lay ther and satisfy the ravenous hunger she so often felt deep within herself.

Simba couldn’t have been happier. Nala, the lioness he loved was finally starting to outgrow everything around them, just as it had happened in his wildest desires.

But nothing last forever.

It was a new day, and with it Simba was starting to put in place an idea on how to feed Nala, without having to climb on her massive body. As he pulled the carcass of a particularly large Zebra atop Pride Rock, with the intention of letting it fall toward Nala’s muzzle, he suddenly noticed that she was wobbling more than usual. Instantly worried, he left the carcass there and climbed down, quickly moving on her flab folds until he was laying right in front of her muzzle.

“My Queen, is something wrong?”

Nala, seeing her husband so close and yet, so far away from her could do nothing but openly crying, leaving the worried Simba in an even greater state of agitation.

“I…I can’t…Move…Simba! I…I’m… Way….too…Big! I can…barely see…or speak…
What’s wrong… with me!?”

The king, internally calming down, realized that although she had accepted his ideas regarding her feedings and the diet she had to follow, she hadn’t considered how her own body would fare, after such a caloric onslaught. She was scared of finding herself so suddenly in a body so vast and big that not even their shared den would be enough now, to contain her girth.

‘Although…’ he thought by himself ‘…She really has grown massive in such a short time.’

“Nala, my beautiful Queen, is that so wrong? To be able to just enjoy your relax, to eat delicious meals…is that such a horrible life to be lived?”

“N-No…B.But…I can’t…do…anything…besides that. I can’t…even hug you…anymore…”

Simba smiled at her, as he moved his muzzle closer to her own, letting her feel his whiskers against her own.

“I know, with all my hearth, that as you are my only world, you feel the same to me. I just want to see you happy, with that beaming smile of yours, so, don’t you worry about these little problems, sweetheart.”

As he said that he kissed her gently, before continuing.

“But, don’t you worry anymore, I’ll have Rafiki to check on you, just to be on the safer side.”

“I…I love you…Simba…My King…for all you do…for me…”

That same morning, Rafiki, the baboon, arrived in hast to Pride’s Rock and he too, at first, stood agape seeing how massive Queen Nala had become. Quickly, though, he went to work, as he firstly assured Nala of his presence and thet he was then, going to check if everything was alright. If a bystander were to be watching, he would have seen a strange, old baboon, jumping and running, somersaulting and even touching and licking, the massively fattened forms of Queen Nala, but everyone in the Pride knew that as strange as he was, there was no one that knew healing magic as Rafiki.

As the baboon, then slowed down, coming finally to a rest in front of Nala’s muzzle, he stared deeply in her eyes, and then smiled widely at the lioness.

“My queen, I see nothing wrong in you. I’ve checked with the Winds and the Earth, with the Water and even with the Mighty Sun, but nothing is out of place.”

“B-But…Rafiki…This…all of… this... Isn’t normal, is it?”

“Ah, My Queen, all of this? It is a sign.

A sign that fertility and growth are coming in our lands! You are the promise of a bountiful future, my Queen. If you were to stop, that could be worse. The spirits who bestowed this gift upon you, could grow angry. The Pride’s territory could wither down and die.

No, Nala, everything is as it should be.”

The lioness, feeling somewhat more secure in her situation, thanks to the words of the sage baboon, decided to try and enjoy what she was feeling with the new body she now had. And, without her knowing, a secondary effect of the Serum activated as soon as her mind began to release dopamine. As the serum reacted to the enzyme, it began to associate the pleasure that Nala was feeling, with the conscious thought of growing bigger and fatter. As this effect took place, Nala soon completely forgot about her previous worries, as she began to truly enjoy how it felt as her body grew bigger and wider, as more food was given to her to consume.

Simba couldn’t have been prouder of his wife, as she began once more to indulge, letting her stomach decide for her. He often, as night came and hid him by the stares of other, found himself snuggling on her flabby body, releasing the pleasure that filled him in having such a humongous mass of fat as a mate.

And yet, as morning arrived, he and the other lionesses, kept on feeding Nala as much as they could, throwing down from the natural balcony that was Pride Rock distinctive feature, the carcasses that they had managed to hunt down. Wildebeest, Gazelles, Zebras, the Pride was being scoured clean by the hunting party of Pride Rock in order to keep feeding the massive, quickly becoming blob-like, Queen. Adding to the menu even larger animals as hippos and, some time, elephants.

Nala, though, seemed to have an inexhaustible hunger, as she began to swallow entirely the smaller animals given to her, as her body kept growing more and more massively. And yet, she too was now finding herself in pure bliss everytime she felt her body oozing out wider and fatter, as her stomach capacity increased, with each new hundred pounds she gained throughout each feeding.

Waves upon waves of pleasure passed within her body, as the Queen kept growing and growing, as her fat began to fill out completely the space in front of the natural rocky formation, as she forced the lionesses to sleep on her own gargantuan form.

The human scientist were astonished in seeing how useless were words to describe the specimen they had injected with their serum. Exactly as they had imagined, as her body grew bigger, so her pleasure increased, and yet, by the constant swelling of her fattened middle, by the almost permanent behavior of the specimen to keep her jaws widely open, they knew that the lioness was completely addicted to eating.

And yet, as the drone relayed its recordings to the control room, where they all were, discussing about the specimen, they could see that while there was going to be no end in sight, in relation to her growth, her presence in that ecosystem was soon going to transform that fertile land in a place void of any life.

They had a decision to take.

The moment of observation had come to an end, now it was time for action.

And the action was to…
141122121111211212444.title: Whale watching…in the Savannah

choices: She forgets about Simba, replacing him with Kurt.
She starts a friendship with the human
As she eats and grows, she starts to feel the need for a male…
Meanwhile, at Pride Rock, Asha start to enjoy being Simba’s mate…a bit too much
Something else…
1411221211112112124441.content:
The lead scientist knew that, as much as was preferable to have the specimen living in their habitat, a lion of that size was going to be noticed sooner or later by the authorities. To prevent that, he began to request to his superiors to organize a retrieval mission, in order to collect the specimen from its den and to bring it within the Lab.

Once there, their trapper, the one who had found her and injected her with the serum, was going to follow her as the serum acted on her. The higher-ups quickly approved the idea and began to lay down strategies to conduct this operation.


Meanwhile, at Pride Rock, Nala had finally started to enjoy her fattening up. She was loving it so much that not even her love to Simba could compare to the feelings that filled her every time she gorged. Simba, although loving to see his Queen growing so much, was noticing that Nala wasn’t interested anymore in him and so, as he still enjoyed seeing her grow, he began to shift his attention to a specific lioness that was trying so hard to impress him.

Asha.

The lioness, as she had kept her plan of fattening up her Queen, saw this and began to reap the bounties as she started to be more and more affectionate to Simba. As days passed, Simba began to focus his attention to Asha, enjoying more and more how affectionate the lioness was being toward him. Soon enough, he fell head over heels over her, as he also began to plan a way to remove Nala from her current position, wanting to instate Asha as his new mate. As he talked with Asha, she quickly came up with an idea that Simba seemed to like almost immediately.

“See, Simba, if Nala was to be elevated to Goddess of the Pride, she couldn’t be any more a mere Queen. And with her raising to that status…”

“I see…I could take you as my Queen! Asha, you’re a genius, how could I have never noticed it before?”

Shortly after, the entire Pride celebrated the change of status of Nala, as she grew from being a Queen to becoming the Goddess of the Pride, due to her massive size. Simba then, after an, apparently, heartfelt discourse toward the gloriously bright future of Nala on her way to godhood, he released the second news of the day.

Instating Asha as his new Queen.


That same night, as if fate had wanted it, three massive helicopters made their way toward Pride Rock.

As they began circling the area, a few panels opened and some weird looking gun began firing sleeping gas pellets all over Pride Rock, rendering the entire den asleep in a matter of minutes. With this done, as two Heli’s kept circling around, patrolling the area, the third landed as men began to move a massive net all around the humongous sized Nala, quickly enveloping her in it, while attaching lifting cables to each Heli, as they got closer to the ground. Once the net was safely secured, and the men on land had boarded again, the three helicopters began to slowly lift off the ground the massively sized lioness, stabilizing her position and then, taking her away.

As this operation was carried out, one lion had been awake enough to see it, but didn’t raise any alarm as only a grin appeared on its muzzle. This lion, as soon as it saw Nala moved away, quickly re-entered the den it shared with another one. Simba.
Asha, slowly, lulled herself to sleep, already deciding what to say the following morning about the fate of Goddess Nala.

‘And good riddance to her.
Now Simba, and Pride Rock with him, shall be under my control.’



Nala slowly woke up expecting herself to be still in Pride Rock. As she opened her eyes, instead, she saw that she was in the Savannah. Although, the air tasted differently from what she knew of it. Slowly, she tried to call her friends, her mate, but none came. Suddenly afraid, and growing hungrier, she tried to move but, was harshly reminded that she had lost that ability, as all she did was jiggle and wobble in place.

Suddenly, though, an unknown odor arrived at her nostrils. Looking around she saw that it was coming from a strange creature that was approaching her slowly. As if it was afraid if her.

‘No…’ she thought ‘Not afraid. It is trying to earn my trust.’


As the trapper entered the testing area where they had placed the specimen, he could see that the Organization had done a good job to replicate the Savannah… Although, they had completely failed on the smell coming from it. The massive room he was in, in fact, looked like the real deal, but was mostly aseptic, without any real smell of the real thing. Still, he began to move cautiously forward, approaching the same blubbery specimen he had tagged a few weeks before.

As he moved forward, he felt that the lioness was aware of his approach. He didn’t know how he did it, but it was a talent that he had always had.

He could feel what the animal in front of him felt, almost as if he could read their minds.

And in that moment, he knew that she was taking care of his movements.

“Easy, girl. I’m not here to hurt you. Let me come closer…I’ve got something you might like…”

Nala, as she felt her ravenous hunger building up, suddenly smelled something delicious coming from that strange creature. Rapidly her wariness vanished, replaced by eagerness as she felt the creature getting closer to her, feeling its ‘paws’ on her flesh as it began to get closer to her muzzle.

Eager to eat, as she saw the creature getting closer, she opened her jaws wide as it tossed a ball shaped something into her mouth. As soon as she had swallowed it, she felt an explosion of taste in her mouth, leaving her completely stupefied. It didn’t do nothing to quench her hunger, but the taste she felt released such a massive wave of pleasure that she couldn’t refrain from moaning.

“You liked that, didn’t you, Girl? Well, I’ve got more for you. A lot more. But we need to go at it slowly first.

Once you let me stay with you without issue, we can see to speed up things a bit…”

Nala didn’t understand a word of what the creature said but, somehow, she could feel him and his intentions towards her. She knew that whatever he was, it was Male. And that he wanted to help satisfy her hunger but, he needed to have her to trust in him, first.

“Well, creature…I’ll trust you. Bring me more of that food…I need more of it…much more!”


The trapper, Kurt, had always had his talent working for him, but in this lioness case, he could also feel a connection. The feelings he was getting from her, were that much stronger that he thought to be able to speak with her, if he focused himself enough.
The scientists had warned him about this effect.

They had said that the Serum she had been injected with could, potentially, increase the capacity of non-verbal communication, as a solution to speeding up the fattening of the subject under its influence.

‘It has to be like this.
This side effect, coupled with my empathy, must be making me easier to understand her. Still, I can’t hear anything else but roars from her but, it feels like there is a meaning… almost as if she just speaks a different language.
Will have to see as we go forward…’

As he gently caressed her fattened muzzle, Nala began to lick his hand in happiness. She wasn’t sure why but this creature was getting on her good side really quickly. Plus, as he caressed her, she could smell that delicious meat he had given to her before, coming from somewhere on the ground in front of her.

As soon as she smelled it, Kurt knew what was making the specimen so eager and happy.

“You’re really starving, aren’t you? Well… Let’s have you fed then.”

The man, quickly, climbed down to collect the large box of meat that had been just delivered there by a set of retractable panels, and slowly made his way up again to the small hill shaped lioness in front of him. As he sat in front of her muzzle, he then proceeded in feeding her the steaks of meat, treated with a compound to make them deliciously addictive and fattening. At first, he tossed them into her muzzle but, as she learned and slowed down, he began hand feeding her slowly.

Nala was enjoying herself much more than she had ever felt, while in Pride Rock. Not only the meat was tastier but, the creature was so gentle that she could really feel how much he cared for her. Still, since near the entrance there were still a few antelope carcasses, she licked her lips as she moved away from the entryway and laid down to enjoy her breakfast.
A couple of hours later, as Simba entered the Den he saw that Asha was napping softly near the entrance, beside her the skeletons of the two carcasses left from the previous day. Feeling proud of how Asha was looking, he then proceeded in bringing in the corpses of the offerings from the Pride huntresses for their Queen.

Slowly, stealthily, as if he was stalking a prey, he moved toward her, snuggling close to her, feeling her soft chubby body against his own. Four aircraft transport helicopter type carriers that closely resembled S-64F Air Crane's. Instead, though, neither of them had any markings on them except the logo diamond logo with the words X-LRG. They had arrived during the night, shot out gas cannisters to make sure the lion pride was kept asleep, as well as the massive lioness herself, then a small army of men emerged out to get a high tension net around and under the hill sized fat lioness blob. Though getting it fully under the fat immobile lioness proved somewhat of a hinderance. But with several men going underneath the lioness's heavy mass of fat that was her belly and pulling the net along with them, they got it done. So they hooked the net up to all four helicopter Air Crane's to lift her off the ground gradually. Even some of Nala's fat was oozing and spilling out between the net's cables.

Lifting the lioness fully off the ground, though her underside bulged downward from the weight, they got her up into the air above the tree line and carried the lioness along with her to her new area that was given to them by the head scientist. He had big plans for this lioness, no doubt.

When the four helicopter Air Crane's got to the destination, the lowered the lioness blob back down fully onto the ground, got the net out from underneath her much the same way they did getting the net under her in the first place. The helicopters took off back to the underground lab for the next phase to begin.

The lab scientists had decided on the option to collect Nala but put the almost mountain sized fat lioness blob halfway between their underground lab and Pride Rock, so her lion family and pride could still visit her. But they chose on a lone young human, one that had only just started the group. It was actually the son of the man who had first tagged the lioness at the start. His name was Leo Feeder Wolfe. The others occasionally joked about his middle name but now he was being given a chance to let his dream and fantasy come true. Though the scientists in the lab didn't mention what the specimen was, of what species. Leo had shrugged and accepted it.

With his father having empathy, his was an ability to understand animal language as if he was talking to any other person plain as day. After he followed two lab test hunters up to ground level, he was given a data pad much like an ipad to record and keep track of his progress with the special specimen. He was also given a thick and long hose all curled up to carry, it was as thick as a fire fighting hose but with a different nozzle. He nodded and went on walking to the mapped area where the test specimen was located. "A few miles from here. I wonder what species this one is." He thought out loud, holding the ipad sized data pad to follow the gps map currently displayed on it. At least he had packed some water bottles with him.

Though he did wonder what content was in that massive mountain sized giant vat. Perhaps some kind of high potent fattening stuff. Though, if he was told, it was lard mixed with the Serum. The final type. Where it made the test subject always remain completely healthy no matter how fat, rapidly digest one pound would equal a ton gained, fatten up and out all over in all directions and finally not only increasing a desire to get fatter and a uncontrollable gluttony, a lust for the next male the subject sees and smells.

At least Leo didn't have to worry himself much about the local wildlife, this area was enclosed by a high stone wall that reached up to the height of a football stadium and was ten miles in all directions with the fat lioness blob specimen having been air-dropped right at the center of it all. Giving the lioness room and space to freely fatten out for miles around. Though, if she outgrew that margin. Things might get troublesome with the authorities if they found out.

By sunrise, he finally made it to where the fat hill sized lioness blob had been placed at. Now he was ready to begin feeding her more food right after the lioness mound and pile of fat rolls woke up, pulling and unraveling the long and clear hose as he got closer to her. But until she was awake, he decided to sit there on the ground in front of her spreading and ripple-jiggling pond mass of chin rolls, also seeing the fat bloated and widened face cheeks on both sides of her mass of chin rolls.

1411221211112112124444.content:
The scientists in the human lab had been hard at work as they tried to find a solution to the threat that they had involuntarily created. The serum that they had been tasked to test had meant to be used initially as a way to fight starvation but, as they got to testing it on lab animals, the application turned immediately over to the military.

Yet, the people working on it weren’t the ruthless, heartless, being of the average joe imagination. For this reason, as soon as they saw that the specimen they had injected with the serum began to threat its entire eco-system, they began to think on solution to the issue.

As the day rolled on, and the animal counts in the Pride Rock kept diminishing, as most of the preys were being given to the continuously growing Nala, one of the humans came out with a solution.

“So, you’re telling me, that your great idea is to feed her even more?”

“Well, Sir, not quite. But yes.

You see, working with a compound made from a particle of the serum, me and my team, have managed to create a substance that is extremely caloric, while also being easy to replicate.

We’re just now finishing the details, as flavors, but it is mostly ready to being tested on the specimen…if you agree, Sir.”

“Alright… Alright. You’ve green light. And let’s pray that the lioness will be satisfied.”


Meanwhile, at Pride Rock, Simba and the huntresses stared in awe at the size of Queen Nala. As all of them were standing on the natural rocky balcony that gave the name to their territory, they could see the massive, wobbling, jiggling shape of Queen Nala as she began to wake up from her slumber. Each of them stared, with its own set of emotions, at how the once proud toned lioness, turned into a veritable sea of flab, acted as soon as she woke up.

Simba was overjoyed and filled with lust toward his mate.

He couldn’t believe that Nala had grown indeed so hugely. It was way over any fantasy he may ever had. And yet, as he saw her growing bigger than their den, bigger than Pride Rock, eve, he couldn’t refrain from wishing for her even more.

Asha, instead, glared hatefully to that mass of jiggly lard that their Queen had become. She had done all she could to maximize the gains of that foolish lion and yet, Simba hadn’t once shown his displeasure over her. She couldn’t understand how the proud and mighty Simba was able to love such an immobile glutton.

Yet, as she thought about Nala, a thought crossed her mind.

‘The Queen is immobile now, isn’t she? So, what’s to stop me from enticing Simba to prefer me as mate, instead of her?

This is a great idea, indeed.’

Following this new plan of hers, she quickly began to stay near Simba at all times, helping him, comforting him and, when time would arise, ready to relive him of his stress.

Beside those two, the other lionesses in the Pride couldn’t believe their eyes.

They were still convinced that their Queen was suffering from a strange disease and yet, as each of them watched the literal mountain of flab in front of them, as the walked on her, as they slept on her, the huntresses began to idolize Nala, as if she was the most glorious hunter and predator in the entire territory.

True, some of them snickered a bit on her behind, as Nala wasn’t anymore capable of moving, or feeding herself but, nonetheless, she had become of such an impressive size, that they could only consider her at the same level as the Gods.

Nala, instead, was enjoying it.

At first, she had been scared of her impressive growth but, after Rafiki’s assertion that her growth was a sign, she began to truly enjoy her growth. As she began to enjoy the feeling she also began to feel waves of pleasure growing within herself. Soon, she became to lose herself in these sensations, starting to actively try to gain more weight in order to feel that pleasure once more.

As she started down on this path, it was obvious that the amount of food delivered to her increased exponentially, as she ate more than before to grow bigger, while the preys given to her by the rest of the pride started to grow both in size and in quantities. If at first a dozen gazelles would have lasted her a meal, at the size she was now, were necessary not less than six elephants.

And yet, Nala kept growing bigger and wider, adding roll upon roll of fat on her frame, as her entire shape morphed into a humongous blob of fat, expanding on every side, barely contained anymore within the rocky formation surrounding Pride Rock. Her legs completely enveloped by her fat up to her fattened paws, becoming nothing more than massive, round, stubs pointed at the sky. Her head, while it had been covered also in fat, still remained roughly of the same shape, as did her muzzle, which though had grown so used to bite, chew and swallow larger preys, that she kept it always wide open.

That morning was no exception to how Nala’s days passed. As the sun rose from the horizon, the huntresses began the arduous task of rolling off Pride Rock the massive prey they had captured, giving them as offering to their queen. And yet, Simba could see that something had to give. As much as they were hunting within the plains, the preys were getting scarcer and scarcer.

And yet, he couldn’t bear himself to stop feeding his mate.

As Midday approached, though, the problems that Simba had been seeing as distant future, made themselves real. As he approached the larder, where the offering to Queen Nala had to be left, he realized that what was there could barely defined a snack for the mountain sized lioness. As he inquired with the huntresses, they relayed to him that no other preys had been available that day.

Feeling dejected, lashing out to them, he retreated toward his den, not knowing that Asha was stalking him, ready to start her new plan of replacing Nala. But as he had just entered the cave, a loud whirring sound reverberated all around Pride Rock, as the lions tried to look around, to identify from where this sound was coming, they saw a massive bird in the sky. It was high in the sky, reflecting the light of the sun on its glinting feathers.

All the lions, Nala included, stared open mouthed to the massive bird, suddenly afraid of the strange, never seen before, animal. Yet, the bird didn’t seem to have hostile intentions, as all it did, was to start coughing up massive lumps of a strangely colored meat, letting those chunks fall down on the lion’s larder, quickly overfilling it. Stopping only when the chunks of meat literally covered twice the area of the larder, the strange bird let out a strange screech and flew away, vanishing into the sun.

As Simba and the other lionesses gathered around their now overfilled larder, observing the strange lumps of meat, out of that pile came out Rafiki, wearing a massive smile on his old, wrinkled, face.

“Ha-ah! The gods answered to our(mine) Prayers! This is good food.

Richest than the most delicious prey around.

Simba! My King, this food shall be enough for both our Queen and the Pride.

Pray the Gods! Celebrate their Assistance!”

Simba, smiling, began to bark orders, quickly assigning most of his huntresses to feeding Nala with the massive chunks of meat, gauging how many were needed to satisfy her hunger, while having the rest of them to prepare themselves for a banquet in celebration of the Gods mercy. As he did so, he swiftly turned over to the lioness that had stayed at his side, as of late, nuzzling her with his muzzle.

“Oh, Asha, thank you for having stayed at my side for this long. I couldn’t ever had done it without your support. Today, I want you at my side, during our celebration.”

“King Simba, you flatter me. I’ve just been a good friend to you.”

As evening approached, Pride Rock was jubilant.

The meat brought by the god’s messenger was indeed richer than most, as shown by Nala who ended up stuffed after only six chunks of it, and every lion was getting ready to feast with it at the incoming dinner. What nobody seemed to realize was that their Queen had grown massively after only six chunks of that strange meat, having grown of roughly two feet all over soon after her meal.

Nobody had noticed though, since Nala was already so big that two feet overall weren’t really noticeable.

But as the feast started, and everyone began to freely indulge, for the first time in ages, two lions noticed that something was strange. These two, both of which were trying to eating only the normal meat, were none other than Simba and Asha, and they saw that the rest of the Pride was going at the strange chunks of meat with an increasing ravenous hunger. But it wasn’t that, that had caught their attention.
It was the fact that…

14112212111121121244444.content:
As the celebratory feast went on, both Simba and Asha noticed something worrying. As each huntress, and their cubs, began eating the food received from the gods, each of them was seemingly swelling slowly with fat. At first Simba couldn’t’ believe it, as he immediately stopped himself from digging through the strangely enticing chunk of meat, but as he kept on watching he could see that it was true.

As he moved his gaze from the meat to each of the huntresses, he managed only slightly to repress a roaring laughter from erupting from his chest. As he watched in awe, he could see that one of his most coveted fantasies was coming true.

To be the leader of an entire den of overweight lionesses.

Yet, he also noticed that, although they were slowly getting heavier, none of the lionesses seemed to notice how big they were getting. This news pleased the King on so many levels, although he saw with some disdain that someone wasn’t growing at all. Beside him, scared expression on her muzzle, stood Asha, as she watched her most terrible nightmare coming to life right in front of her.

All of her friends growing bigger and chunkier with every bite they took from the strange meat.

Terrified, she quickly switched the strange chunk of meat with a normal one, as she quickly began to eat it, hoping that no one had noticed her. As she chewed, though, for a single instant she felt betrayed. For the meat she was having was extremely delicious, much more than any normal carcass she had ever eaten. For that single moment she had been aware of having fallen into a trap but, a moment after she barely was able to remember about it, as the addicting taste of the meat clouded her mind, making her blind to her own gain.

Simba, smiled seeing how Asha had so easily fallen into his trap. For as she had been shocked into seeing what had befallen her friends, he had swiftly replaced the normal chunk of meat she had at her side, with another sample of the strangely enticing meat received by the gods.

The King, now sampling by himself the meat coming from one of the few carcasses hunted down that day, simply laid down enjoying the view as all the other members of the Pride gorged and swelled with fat, as they kept devouring with abandon the addictive meat. One by one, he saw them chubbying out, as their bellies grew heavier, as their forms softened all over, as each of them began to hunch down, not able anymore to stand on their own hind legs for too much time.

Still, when the feast was over, each of the lionesses laid down, feeling satisfied with their meal, still unable to see what had befallen them. Simba noticed in particular, a few of them who tried to move away, barely able to waddle as their stomachs dragged on the ground, yet, not one of them raised a peep, almost as if nothing had changed since before the feast.

Even Asha, who was still tearing out chunks from her portion, although her belly had grown so fat to actually forcing her to lay on it, unable to reach the ground, looked confused to Simba as he moved closer to her.

“Everything alright, Asha?”

“Yeah…*gulp*…why? Is something the matter?”

“I was wondering if you could do me a favor. I saw that one of the huntresses, I believe Sutabi, has left quite a bit of her portion uneaten. Could you, please, throw it away?”

“S-Sure…I’ll take care of it…”

As soon as Asha believed to be alone, while Simba was hiding behind a rock, the lioness greedily swallowed down her own portion, only to start gorging on what he had given her to be thrown away.

“Why wasting…*Munch*… good food…*Gulp*…when we can simply…enjoy it? I don’t understand him, sometimes.”

As days began to pass, King Simba felt himself overjoyed every time he left his den. For, as he walked through Pride’s rock, he could see all of the females lying around lazily, some busily eating the meat given by the gods, other quietly napping, but all with one thing in common. All of them starting to look fatter and fatter as the days passed.

As he was now getting used to, he began his round around his den, passing first near Nala, always enjoying how more massive she kept growing, although he was starting to get worried about her. For while the other lionesses were growing chubbier, Nala herself was starting to become enormous. Already, her head was being pushed so high from her body, that she almost reached the ridge where each King before Simba had been crowned, and yet, she always needed more and more of that strange meat to satisfy herself.

After visiting her, and exchanging a few pleasantries, while the lioness was busy with her eating, Simba would then start moving around the rest of his fattened family. As he was starting to even provide, for some of them, with more and more of the divine meat as those couldn’t move on their own as well as before.

One such example was Asha.

The poor lioness had grown really addicted to the stuff, so much so that she could barely stop herself to sleep, often sleep eating as if it was natural for her to do so. Simba even tried to hint to her about her new body but, the lioness still acted blindly at his insinuation, blind to her current situation.

“Asha? You feeling alright?”

“I’m good… is something the matter?”

“No, I was just wondering if you wanted to come with me for a quick hunt…”

The lioness, as she thought about it, unconsciously tried to move her paws, to feel the ground but, as big as she had grown, all she could feel under them was only her bloated and engorged middle.

“Thanks, but, if it is the same, I would prefer to just rest a bit more. We did go hunt a few hours ago and I’m feeling just a bit tired, still.”

Simba could barely hold back laughter inside of his chest. Lately, had been he the one going on hunt, since the strange bird had begun to show up every few days, always leaving their larders overfilled with more of those strange chunks of meat, before setting out again.

It was almost as if the gods to which Rafiki had preyed upon wanted them to grow fat.

But the lion could care less about the gods, all he was focused now was helping his den to grow into the harem of his dreams. And while Nala was seemingly content of simply be on the receiving end, as Simba, every few hours, let more of those chunks of meat to fall from the ridge of Pride Rock directly near Nala’s open muzzle, the rest of the Pride needed his attention constantly.

That day, for example, as he made his rounds, he saw one of the younger huntresses, a lioness named Sutabi, tiredly walking, her heavy belly dragging on the ground. For a few minutes, Simba stood silently behind her, watching mesmerized as her mounds of fat jiggled to and fro with any movement she did, until he snapped out of it and got closer to the lioness.

“Good Morning Sutabi, how’s going?”

“King Simba! What a pleasant…surprise. Nothing much…I was just… *Ergh!* … going to the larders… to have a quick…. Pick me up snack…”

“Well then, let me be of assistance, then. You girls work so hard for the Pride, let me bring you something to munch on.”

The lioness did feel grateful, although she also felt a bit ashamed of forcing her own King to serve her, instead of the opposite. Yet, when she saw Simba returning to her, dragging two massive pieces of the Divine Meat, she tried to refuse, although only lightly.

“M-My King! I…I couldn’t… Queen Nala may…”

“Do not fret. It is only a small snack, isn’t it?”

“I… I guess…I may have…thought that… there was much more… than my usual fare…”

Her mind, given the logical excuse, as it tried to prevent her from realizing the truth, quickly accepted the words of the Lion, making Sutabi truly believe that what she was seeing was her usual fare and not the massive three times over meal she was actually receiving.

Leaving the lioness to gorge on the fattening meat, enjoying how the young lioness began to already swell with adipose on her figure, Simba moved away, until he noticed a younger cub trying valiantly to have someone else coming out of their cave.

Curious, he went to investigate, standing silently behind the little cub, watching what was going on inside…

While Nala went to the waterhole to wait to be fed, Simba went to tell the lionesses of the pride Nala's
wish. When he got there up to Pride Rock's promotory where the pride usually gathered to have
meeting talks about pride matters, the other were there waiting for him. They greeted him and they
greeted back. Then he began his talk with them.
"Nala, the Queen, wishes if you would hunt for her. She will just eat and grow big. She wants to be fat
and huge. Queen Nala wants the royal treatment of being fed her food."
The other lionesses listened, a few were shocked, the rest nodded their heads.
"Yes, we'll hunt and get food for her to help make her huge. We'll give her the royal treatment." The
lionesses said in unison.
Simba smiled and stayed there at Pride Rock to think about things while he watched the lionesses
part from Pride Rock, then gather in groups of four to five to go hunt for Nala. They had in mind to hunt
for the most fatter and bigger of prey like hippos, water buffalos, elephants and giraffes.

14131.content:
No longer than Nala sat waiting at the water hole, when she felt a prick of something at her neck. Sure she was frightened and got up to try to run away in any direction from whatever had stung her but the dart tranquilizer did its work on her. Made her groggy and soon she slowed and stopped then promptly fell onto the ground.
What happened next was all a haze. Being lifted but unable to do anything, then put into the back of a landrover and jostled as it drove to its intended location.
The rest was a blur as her world eventually faded into darkness.

Slowly she was coming to as her vision returned to a blur and her hearing came back to her not long her vision cleared and slowly Nala managed to lift up her head wearily. And to her shock and amazement, she had woken up in the middle of something as there was five humans in side this man-made place, what looked like to her as a cave. Nala couldn't get up to her feet yet as the grogginess was slowly being purged out of her system.
The four taller and older men surrounded a younger man and they were punching the young man in the gut, smacking him with rod of some kind that emitted a shock like lightning, thrashing the young man with leather whips, beating him to the floor with strange objects that were police officer clubs and even stabbing and impaling the young man with blades from knives. All of which caused the young man to cry out in pain, shreiks of terror and torture as the older men brutalized the young man. The older four men would ask the younger man
something in the local African language but the young man didn't seem to understand as he just remained
silent. When they stopped, each of the four older placed a well made kick at the young man in different areas, spat on him then took their weapons and left. The 'cave' entrance being sealed shut. Leaving her alone with the young man. Gradually, her limbs were getting the feeling back into them. And Nala moved to push herself up to stand on all four paws. It was looking like the young human male before her was in the same position as she was. They were both trapped in here with no way out.

What was she supposed to with this young human? Eat him? Not even if her life depended on it. Humans had a bad taste in their meat after all. Maybe she could somehow get this young human male to cooperate with her and together they could find a way out. They'd have to work toegether. But she'd have to work on getting his trust and to do that, she'd have to help him recover from the wounds he received from the brutalizing. Nala made a thought for later to make sure that if they did get out of here, she'd take him with her back to the Pridelands since the other humans appearently didn't want him here. Nala sighed and walked over slowly to where the prone young human male lay. Being careful but she already knew that he was harmless cause he didn't have any weapons. And besides, without the sustained injuries, he was cute for a human. Lean and nicely muscled but not overly muscled. Of what looked like an averaged weight of possibly 110 to 130 pounds.

141312.content: Remarkably, after Nala had discovered the young human male could understand animal language, she got along well with him and was glad that he wasn't here to kill her but to help feed and fatten her. That got her feeding seven meals a day. And with Nala's nursing of licking his wounds, he recovered fully in a month. As for Nala, she had visibly gained weight she so desires. And so far she was as big as a hippo at four tons. Her belly pressed firmly on the large cells room floor and spread out oozing on the floor from her by a foot. Her sides were now four feet wide and bouncy. He'd been feeding her fatty hippo meat, thick slabs of meat that were neatly cut. Yet, it was like she couldn't get enough of it. Flabby thick rolls surrounded and ringed around her fat head. Her head was now as big as a elephant's head while her face cheeks was as big as her rump rounded out to bouncy and wobbly spheres. The fat on her back was equal amount of that on her belly and bulged up above her head level in several bulgy and jiggly humps of lard, making her body look round on all views of her. Her legs, both fore and hind had fattened, thickened with oozy and lardy thick rolls that lay heavily on top of each other from shoulder to even overlap over her paws. Her tail was big, thickened out to look like an elephant trunk behind her but ten times thicker with its own wiggling and lardy rolls as well. Nala's hunger never seemed to stop, for each day she called for more food and bigger amounts of it. She knew the bigger her belly got, the bigger her stomach got and the more food her stomach could hold before it was digested into more fat. The young human male, Lionel, was told by the human scientists that heldboth himself and Nala captive that they were running out of the hippo meat and would have to resort to their next source of food in the millions of giant vats the scientists had made for the lioness filled with incredibly fattening paste in all the vats and continue with feeding the lioness by using a feeding tube. Simba came up to Nala and nuzzled into her fatty flab. Surprised but pleased that Nala had already

143.content:
A thought came to the Queen's mind, she could ask Rafiki if he could or had anything that could help
make her fat and huge. So Nala got up and started walking down from Pride Rock and headed towards
the boabab where the shaman baboon lived.
Once there, Nala called up to him. "Rafiki. Can I speak with you? I've something to ask of you."
Chuckling, the baboon replied. "Wait a bit, old Rafiki needs to get something he just recently made."
What could he made that would make him tell her to wait for him? She'd likely find out.

After some scuffling and rustling in the branches, Rafiki nimbly climbed down and hopped
down in front of her. In both hands he was holding a large object. It was a big fruit, colored like
a passion fruit but bigger in size and roundness.

Nala eyed the fruit-like thing wearily but drove her question home. "If you don't mind, Rafiki,
do you think you can make me a potion that will make he fat and huge? I want the royal
treatment but none of the other lions- including Simba will hunt for me." She said with a pouting
to her muzzle lips.

The baboon chuckled in his crazy way, patting the large fruit he was holding. "What do you
think this thing is, hmm? I was told by a former Queen to make it for you. So, eat this and your
inner desire will begin." He said, holding the large beachball sized passion fruit out to her
with both hands.

With a hunger and greed she never felt before, he took the large fruit in her mouth with a bite,
lowering herself onto the ground and ate the whole thing up. It made her full and temporarily
satisfied her hunger for now. But for how long? That's when she noticed she had a large bulge
down on her belly as big and round as the passion fruit had been. And she liked it. She knew
it was the pieces of fruit in her stomach that had gathered together. "Thank you, Rafiki. I'm
going for a walk now, to see if I can find some food to eat."

Watching her go, Rafiki sighed and chuckled some more, then went back up into his
baobab tree.

Walking, Nala decided to head south to look for more fruit of something else she could
feed her hunger when it next came. What she didn't know, was that Nala was heading for
a small man-made log cabin that lived at the southern border of the Pridelands. She ate
a four ton female hippo along the way when she got hungry next. Which had ended up
fattening all of her body out to the size of the female hippo had been. Even her legs,
tail, neck and face cheeks was thick with fat. Rolls of jiggly flab and lard layered her
previous thin and skinny body. With each heavy step Nala made, her entire body would
slosh and undulate wildly. But as night came, Nala yawned and found a place to spend
the night, on the porch of the log cabin where she promptly laid her hippo sized fat form
down on, her weight slightly causing the wood floor of the porch to bend underneath her.
At least, for now, she was sated. But how would tomorrow be like?

1431.content: The next morning, the door of the cabin creaks open, waking the obese queen. As she raises her round face to view the emerging occupant she hears "Oh my gosh! My wish came true!" Nala was instantly confused as a young human woman, about 18 years old, slowly walked over to her and kneeled in front of the gluttonous queen. "Finally a big, fat, lioness for myself." The woman says in a slight british accent. "I bet your starving." The woman says as she gets up, grabs a huge serving dish, and piles it high with hippo steaks. She'll walk over and put it within Nala's reach, apparently unafriad of the huge lioness's wild nature. Nala settles herself into a comfortable eating position and begins stuffing herself. The woman giggles at Nala's hunger. "My my. What a hungry lioness you are!" She'll point at herself "I'm Brittany. And you.... Hmmm." She'll look Nala over, her eyes widening as Nala's body fattens even more as she eats. "I'll call you Nala." The surprised lioness looks up at the mention of her name, her new chins still jiggling from her chewing. "How does this human know my name?" She thinks to her self. "I'll bet you want more." Brittany says as she grabs more steaks and puts them in front of Nala on the plate. Nala's fat thickened tail shakes happily as she digs in. Brittany laughs at the sight of the gluttonous queen feeding and growing, her belly fat lifting her off the porch as the wood groans as it supports her growing flab. "I think we are going to be great friends Nala." Nala lifts her now fat face from the diminishing pile of steaks and purrs at the human, drawing another laugh out of Brittany. After the meal Nala found herself quite full for the time being and tries to get up. Her paws barely reach the ground as her stomach has lifted her a couple feet into the air. Her bloated legs jiggle and slosh as Nala struggles to get herself moving, finally managing to get going. Her belly drags on the ground massaging her huge gut and drawing a purr of pleasure from the extremely obese queen. She feels her ass jiggle and quake with each step as the twin orbs of doughy flesh shakes with each labored step, both hanging halfway down her hindlegs. Her tail has doubled in thickness and is slowly getting absorbed by her huge rump. Her legs are in constant motion, the jiggling rubbing up aganist her sides aiding in the ground's massaging of her gut, which pooches out a couple feet between her fore and hind legs. Her chin count is up to 8 and her cheeks are the size of softballs. Brittany watches the blob of a lioness waddle around. "Hey Nala, don't move too much, you might lose some weight. Let me make you a nice space to lay down, eat, and grow." Nala purrs and smiles appreciatively at the young woman's suggestion. By the end of the day, Brittany has built Nala a customizeable covered area. "See? I can adjust it up and out as you grow. That way, you'll be dry and it can grow with you." She holds her hand out for Nala to sniff, which the queen does. Nala finds she quite likes this human and gives the young lady's hand a lick. "Thank you for coming out here Nala." Brittany says as she gently scratches Nala's extremely soft and squishy chins. The queen purrs at the attention to her fat chins, wishing she had more for the girl to scratch.

But he had made sure to send his adopted brother- a young human male of 18 and was known by
the Pride to be Brittany's brother who cared for animals as he did. But she was more of a animal

khaki clothing made up of shorts, shirt, socks, shoes and a wide round brimmed hat.

1431121.content:
"Ah, hey bro, there you are. I see you've returned. How's the rest of the Pride doing?" Britanny asked, coming up to hug her brother. Then parted and stood to look apprehensively to the back yard of her house and she could see the tarp that covered the fat Nala but only a small portion about a quarter of it and she could see some of Nala's flab of her body also, constantly jiggling slowly from her unlabored breathing.
"They're alright, no troubles. By the way, I've something to tell you, sis." Leo said with a glint in his eye.
"Oh? What might that be, bro?"
"Beside your house, there is an underground food factory I had built. And since you've been caring for the local animals...I made the factory for you- or rather for us to feed the animals easier."
"Food factory, here? You mean I can feed my lioness easier with a feeding hose? Thank you, bro."
"A lioness? You have a lioness here? Why didn't you tell me earlier? Who is it? And yes, you can feed a lioness more better witha hose.... or multiple hoses."
"Come see. You'll like how big she is, plus she's already immobile." Britanny grabbed Leo's hand to pull him along with her to the back yard of the house, when they got there Leo got an eye full of what he saw. A huge and very immobile fattened lioness who looked to be the size of an elephant currently.
"Wow, I mean, oh my gosh. Britanny, this is Nala. Simba's lioness mate. How'd she get here?" Leo's eye could hardly believe what he saw, here was the beautiful Nala, fattened some beyond immobility. Last he saw Nala, she was the normal weight of a lioness. "She's...huge....and far more beautiful."
"I came outside yesterday and there she was, as big as a hippo resting on my front porch. Oh my, this is really Nala? But how come she is so hungry? She ate two hippos and two stacks of hippo meat yesterday."
"Yes, this is Nala. Maybe the Pride's baboon shawman gave her something, like a new potion he made just for her." Leo stepped into the shade under the raised canvas, he could tell he was at Nala's front cause in front of him was Nala's fat head. He reached out with both hands to rub and feel over Nala's flabby surface.
Waking up from her food induced slumber, Nala opening her squinty eyes and lifted up her fat heavy head causing her fat round face cheeks to bounce and wobble wildly and her many chins and neck rools to jiggle and bunch up between her muzzle and her fat chest. "Oh, Leo, your here. Please, feed me, I'm soooooo terribly hungry. My food gluttony has returned and it feels endless. Please, please, feed me, even human foods. Feed me Leo, Britanny can help too."

Glad that he was born with the ability to understand animal language, unlike his sister Britanny, Leo nodded and turned to Britanny for help. "Nala said she's hungry again, she's pleading for food. Human food too. Come on and help me, sis." Leo takes his turn to lead Britanny over to one side of the house. Leo pulls out a remote and the ground opens up with the ground parting and sinking below the level of the ground before sliding back into recesses. There is a rumbling sound that also caused the ground to shake, thus causing Nala's fat to wobble like a jello mold of her own as well. A huge building raised up from the football field sized retangle hole in the ground. When it was fully up, Leo smiled and took Britanny along with him. "I need you to operate the vat controls while I get the vat's hose to Nala."
"Yes, I can do that." Britanny said, unsure of how to work the controls.
He leaves Britanny at the control panel for the vats as Leo takes the long hose over to Nala so she can continue her feeding from it to maybe fill her hunger and endless gluttony that has now taken hold of Nala.
